title: Lance Zierlein's 2026 NFL Mock Draft: Major Risers, Trades, and a Surprising Fall
body:
The 2026 NFL Draft is just around the corner, with the highly anticipated event set to take place in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania in just three weeks. As teams continue to finalize their draft strategies, NFL analysts are providing their expert predictions on how the first round may unfold. Lance Zierlein, a renowned NFL analyst, has released an updated mock draft, revealing some surprising risers, a notable plummet, and two blockbuster trades that could shake up the league.

According to Zierlein's latest mock, the Carolina Panthers are set to make a bold move by trading up to select the highly touted quarterback, Tyler Brown, from the University of Alabama. Brown has been making waves in the NFL community with his impressive performance in the pre-draft process, and it seems that the Panthers are willing to take a risk to secure his services. The trade would see the Panthers surrender multiple draft picks in exchange for the opportunity to select Brown at the top of the first round.

Meanwhile, the Kansas City Chiefs have seen their quarterback, Ryan Jenkins, plummet in the mock draft. Jenkins was previously projected as a top-5 pick but has seen his stock take a significant hit due to concerns over his durability and ability to perform under pressure. This development could have significant implications for the Chiefs' plans to build around their young quarterback, and it remains to be seen how they will respond to this unexpected twist.

Zierlein's mock also highlights several players who are expected to rise up the draft board. Wide receiver, Ethan Thompson, from the University of Oregon, is a prime example of this trend. Thompson's impressive performance in the pre-draft process has seen him jump into the top 10, with several teams now considering him a top target. His speed, agility, and ability to make plays in space make him an attractive option for teams looking to upgrade their receiving corps.

The trade activity in Zierlein's mock is not limited to the Panthers and Chiefs, however. The Arizona Cardinals are also involved in a significant trade, surrendering multiple draft picks to select the talented defensive end, Jackson Lee, from the University of Georgia. Lee's impressive combine performance has seen him shoot up the draft board, and it seems that the Cardinals are willing to pay a premium to secure his services.

As the 2026 NFL Draft approaches, teams are facing a multitude of challenges and uncertainties. The availability of top prospects, the impact of trades, and the performance of prospects in the pre-draft process are just a few of the factors that will influence the outcome of the draft. While Zierlein's mock provides a glimpse into the possibilities, it is clear that the actual draft will be shaped by a complex interplay of factors.

As the draft nears, one thing is certain: the 2026 NFL Draft will be an event filled with excitement, uncertainty, and drama. With top prospects, surprise trades, and the potential for blockbuster deals, it promises to be an unforgettable experience for fans and teams alike. Whether your favorite team is looking to rebuild, retool, or make a statement, the 2026 NFL Draft has the potential to shape the course of the league for years to come.
